_meta.author: minhxthanh
_meta.title: Dynamic Text Slider
_meta.description: This is a React component that creates a full-screen hero section. It features a unique, interactive headline where the words "Video Editor" are revealed inside a draggable range slider. The slider tilts dynamically as the user moves the handles, and the handles scale up on hover and drag for better visual feedback. The component is designed to be responsive and visually engaging.
